projectDescription: A high-performance linear attention kernel library for GDN Chunked Prefill, delivering 2-3x forward and 2x backward speedups over FLA Triton kernels on NVIDIA Hopper GPUs via TileLang-fused warp-specialized kernels.
keyFeatures: Gate-driven automatic intra-card context parallelism (auto-CP) exploiting GDN exponential decay
Hardware-friendly algebraic reformulation reducing Tensor Core, CUDA Core, and SFU overhead
TileLang fused warp-specialized kernels with overlapped data movement and computation
2-3x forward speedup and 2x backward speedup over FLA Triton kernel on NVIDIA Hopper (SM90)
BF16/FP16 support with grouped-query attention (GQA) head configurations
publicApiSurface: chunk_gated_delta_rule(q, k, v, g, beta, scale, initial_state, output_final_state, use_qk_l2norm_in_kernel, cu_seqlens, head_first)
chunk_gated_delta_rule_fwd(q, k, v, g, beta, scale, initial_state, cu_seqlens, output_final_state, output_h, auto_cp)
chunk_gated_delta_rule_bwd(q, k, v, g, beta, A, do, dht, scale, initial_state, cu_seqlens)
